Name: Total time between Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR and Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR grouped by case:BudgetNumber

Name: Elapsed time between Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER and Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR
